Hero.title: Clear China Customs Without the Hassle.
Hero.subtitle: Fast, compliant, and guaranteed GACC Decree 248 registration for global Food & Beverage brands. We handle the complex Chinese CIFER system so you can focus on exporting.

Problem.title: Exporting to China? You'll Face These Headaches
Problem.card1Desc: Chinese-only CIFER system, complex regulations, and zero English support make it nearly impossible for foreign companies.
Problem.card2Desc: Wrong HS/CIQ codes lead to rejected applications, delayed shipments, and costly customs penalties.
Problem.card3Desc: Without proper GACC registration, your goods are stuck. Storage fees pile up while you scramble for answers.

Solution.title: We Handle the Complex Part
Solution.step1Desc: We create and manage your Chinese customs registration account.
Solution.step2Desc: Expert matching of your products to the correct Chinese classification codes.
Solution.step3Desc: Translation, labeling compliance, and all required paperwork handled end-to-end.
Solution.step4Desc: $1,200 USD flat fee. One price, full service, guaranteed outcome.

LeadMagnet.title: Free GACC Compliance Checklist
LeadMagnet.subtitle: Download our step-by-step guide to registering your Food & Beverage brand for China.

Expert.title: Meet Your China Specialist
Expert.name: David Zhang
